message:
You know that friend who shows up to a picnic with a full-on buffet, a portable grill, and a backup generator? Yeah, that’s me when it comes to storm season. Last winter, while everyone was scrambling for bread and milk ahead of the big blizzard, I was digging through my supplies, unearthing bags of flour, canned beans, and my trusty camping stove. I even had enough hot chocolate mix to keep the neighborhood warm! 

While my friends raised their eyebrows at the amount of snacks I packed, I couldn’t help but feel a sense of calm. I realized that being a little over-prepared isn’t so bad — it just means you can share the good vibes (and snacks) when the weather takes a turn. 

I learned that in the chaos of severe weather, preparation can be the key to keeping things cozy and fun. And let’s be honest, who doesn’t love a hot cocoa party when the snow is piling up outside? 

What’s your go-to item to have on hand when a storm is brewing?
